facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 2,215 reviews. Infinity pool, free breakfast, and palm trees as far as you can see at Camia Resort & Spa on Ông Lang beach.

This side of Phu Quoc moves slower. Fewer crowds, more sky, actual quiet.

Free breakfast included. Restaurant on-site. The kind of resort that earns repeat visitors.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Infinity pool at Camia Resort & Spa. Palm trees. Zero noise. This is the slower, quieter side of Phu Quoc, and 2,215 reviewers gave it 4.7 stars for a reason. Ông Lang delivers.
